data.title: Sun Communities: Buy Rating Reiterated on Strong Q1, Raised 2026 Core FFO Outlook; Price Target Maintained at $140
data.description:
BMO Capital analyst John Kim maintained a Buy rating on Sun Communities today and set a price target of $140.00.

Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

John Kim has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors including Sun Communities’ stronger-than-expected first-quarter results and improved full-year outlook. The company lifted its 2026 Core FFO per share forecast above consensus to $6.97, supported by robust North American same-property performance and incremental gains from interest income, lower interest expense, and higher brokerage commissions.

Kim also highlights the stability in RV and U.K. operations, as management maintained RV NOI and U.K. NOI guidance despite macro headwinds, and modestly increased North American same-property NOI expectations. Additional support for the Buy rating comes from active capital allocation, including the repurchase of 500,000 shares, while he acknowledges some offsetting negatives such as slightly higher expense growth and second-quarter guidance coming in just below Street expectations, with the price target unchanged at $140.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Intelligence Newsdesk

data.title: Tim James Reiterates Buy on Airboss of America, Keeps $8 Price Target on Defense-Driven Growth Outlook
data.description:
Analyst Tim James of TD Cowen reiterated a Buy rating on Airboss of America, retaining the price target of C$8.00.

Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Tim James has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors that, in his view, continue to support an attractive risk‑reward profile for Airboss of America. He believes the company’s growing exposure to defense‑related demand should underpin revenue expansion and earnings resilience, even as other segments, such as ARS, may require additional time to fully regain volume momentum.

Tim James also maintains confidence that the current market valuation does not fully reflect Airboss’s medium‑term growth prospects and improving cash‑flow profile. As a result, he keeps his price target unchanged at $8, indicating meaningful upside from current levels and justifying a continued Buy recommendation despite near‑term market and execution headwinds.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Intelligence Newsdesk
